name: ADR superseding chain validator rejects a superseding reference to a non-existent ADR id
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0002 Second\nsupersedes: 9999\n' > docs/adr/0002-second.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-supersedes.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_supersedes=9999' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
